top_signals.title: EasyJet Profit Falls 70% Amid Higher Fuel Costs, Lower Demand
top_signals.summary: EasyJet Plc said profit fell by 70% in its fiscal third quarter as the UK budget carrier continues to suffer from higher jet fuel costs and lower consumer demand, driven by the impact from the Middle East conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BNP’s Stock Traders Ride Wall Street Rally With 43% Gain
top_signals.summary: BNP Paribas SA reported better-than-expected results for the second quarter as its stock traders blew past analysts’ estimates, in a sign that the rally that fueled record results on Wall Street spilled over into Europe.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why we're sticking with Alphabet despite an imperfect quarter and more AI spending
top_signals.summary: The market isn't in a forgiving mood, but we're not in a hurry to leave this stock behind.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
